title: linum squarrosum var. jimenezii
intro: Linum squarrosum var. jimenezii, also known as a variety of the prickly flax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Linum squarrosum var. jimenezii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its seeds can be used to make a linseed oil with various medicinal and cosmetic applications.
